name: 09_system_a_met_two_to_three_breaks
description: Branch 3 / System A: condition met, prev vwap_ticks=2 increments to 3, exactly hits VWAP_BREAK_CONFIRM_TICKS so is_vwap_broken flips True. System B fails (reset).
derivation: Outer pass, gate pass. System A: safe_hwm 3.5 >= cross 2.0 AND current_return 1.5 < safe_hwm 3.5 -> MET. new_vwap_ticks = 2 + 1 = 3. is_vwap_broken = (3 >= VWAP_BREAK_CONFIRM_TICKS(3)) = TRUE. System B: current_return 1.5 <= bleed_arm -1.0 is FALSE -> bleed_ticks reset to 0; bleed_broken False. Returns (3, 0, True, False). Pins the threshold semantics: `>= 3` flips on the FIRST tick at 3 (not strictly greater).
